headline: STMicroelectronics: DC And Robotics Opportunities Re-Ignited Enthusiasm (Upgrade)
summary: STMicroelectronics stock is upgraded to a "Buy." Learn more about STM's data center & robotics growth, AWS partnership, and easing inventories.
